title: ConnectionStatus::Error variant is dead — never produced by client_task
description: event.rs defines ConnectionStatus::Error(String) and its Display impl. client_task.rs never emits AppEvent::StatusChanged(ConnectionStatus::Error(...)). All errors go through AppEvent::Error(String) instead. The dead variant wastes cognitive load: a contributor reading the status bar code will assume error states flow through ConnectionStatus::Error, then be confused why it never triggers. It also means the Display impl for ConnectionStatus::Error is untested dead code.
